evals.prompt: Query Store data from the last 7 days. Find regressed queries and plan instability. Users say the app is randomly slow.
evals.expected_output: Regression findings (Q1-Q6) with baseline vs current metrics. Plan instability detection (Q7-Q12) showing query hashes with multiple plans. Resource hotspots (Q13-Q18). Forced plan failures if any. Operational health Q23-Q25.

evals.prompt: We have a forced plan on query_id 42. Is it working? Has it failed?
evals.expected_output: Specifically targets Q9 forced plan failures. Reports whether the forced plan is currently in use, when it last failed, and the failure reason. Recommends action if FORCE_FAILURE_COUNT is incrementing.
